name: 13.52 fl oz Stoneware Tilley Mug Olive Green - Threshold™
description:
Add textured charm to your mug collection with the 13.52-Fluid-Ounce Stoneware Tilley Mug from Threshold™. This olive green mug showcases a textured design with a contrasting rim in a neutral shade for a beautiful look. Suitable for both hot and cold beverages, this stoneware mug allows quick reheating and can be tossed in the dishwasher with its microwave- and dishwasher-safe design.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
